tree.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander
tree.tradeDescription: Acquired from Clippers with Danilo Gallinari, 5 first-round picks, and 2 pick swaps for Paul George and a 2025 1st round pick
tree.note: 2x All-Star, drafted #11 overall by CHA in 2018, traded to LAC on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul George
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Indiana for Victor Oladipo and Domantas Sabonis

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Orlando with Domantas Sabonis and Ersan İlyasova for Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.note: 2x All-Star, won Most Improved Player award with Indiana (2018)

assetsGivenUp.name: Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 24th overall by Seattle SuperSonics using pick acquired from Phoenix
assetsGivenUp.note: 3x NBA All-Defensive Team. Pick acquired from PHX in Kurt Thomas trade (Jul 20, 2007)

assetsGivenUp.name: Emir Preldžić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 2009 2nd round pick (became Emir Preldžić) sent to Phoenix for Kurt Thomas, 2008 1st round pick (Ibaka), and 2010 1st round pick (Quincy Pondexter)

assetsGivenUp.name: Rashard Lewis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded to Orlando Magic for 2009 2nd round pick (Emir Preldžić) and trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Bobby Jackson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 23rd overall by Seattle with their own pick, immediately traded to Denver for James Cotton and 1998 2nd round pick (Rashard Lewis #32)
assetsGivenUp.note: Seattle's own 1997 1st round pick. True origin of the Ibaka chain.

assetsGivenUp.name: Domantas Sabonis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Draft rights acquired from Orlando along with Oladipo and İlyasova for Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.note: 3x All-Star, son of Arvydas Sabonis. ORL's own #11 lottery pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 24th overall by Seattle using PHX pick. Traded to ORL (Jun 23, 2016) for Oladipo, Sabonis, and İlyasova.
assetsGivenUp.note: Same trade as Oladipo branch. Full origin chain: Bobby Jackson (1997) → Rashard Lewis → Preldžić → Ibaka.
